creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Fri Jul 19 17:09:44 2013
New Revision: 323317
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323317

Log:
  - Update to 6.16.0
  
  PR:		ports/180185
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (renchap@cocoa-x.com, >2 weeks)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/rubygem-ohai/Makefile
  head/sysutils/rubygem-ohai/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/sysutils/rubygem-ohai/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/rubygem-ohai/Makefile	Fri Jul 19 16:32:15 2013	(r323316)
+++ head/sysutils/rubygem-ohai/Makefile	Fri Jul 19 17:09:44 2013	(r323317)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# Ports collection makefile for:	rubygem-ohai
-# Date created:				18 Mar 2010
-# Whom:					Renaud Chaput <renchap@cocoa-x.com>
-#
+# Created by: Renaud Chaput <renchap@cocoa-x.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	ohai
-PORTVERSION=	6.14.0
+PORTVERSION=	6.16.0
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
@@ -17,6 +13,7 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-ipaddress>=0:${PORT
 		rubygem-mixlib-log>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-mixlib-log \
 		rubygem-mixlib-config>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-mixlib-config \
 		rubygem-mixlib-cli>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-mixlib-cli \
+		rubygem-mixlib-shellout>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-mixlib-shellout \
 		rubygem-systemu>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-systemu \
 		rubygem-yajl-ruby>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-yajl-ruby

==============================================================================
